requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling — Lighting (Rwanda national energy programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——照明（卢旺达国家能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——照明（盧旺達國家能效計劃）

summary.en: Rwanda does not operate the EU Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2019/2020 minimum-performance regime with an EPREL database. Instead, energy efficiency of lighting is addressed through Rwanda's national energy-efficiency programme and any applicable Rwanda Standard / energy-labelling requirement, supported by RSB and the national energy authorities. The practical obligation is to substantiate efficacy (lm/W) and other declared performance figures with reliable test data (typically IEC 62612-based) within the RSB PVoC programme, and to apply any required energy label or efficiency declaration for the consignment. Confirm with RSB / the importer whether a mandatory energy label currently applies to the specific lamp / luminaire category, since coverage can be category-specific and evolving.
summary.zh: 卢旺达并未实行带 EPREL 数据库的欧盟生态设计法规（EU）2019/2020 最低性能制度。照明能效通过卢旺达国家能效计划及任何适用的卢旺达标准／能效标签要求处理，由 RSB 及国家能源主管部门支持。实际义务是在 RSB PVoC 计划内以可靠检测数据（通常基于 IEC 62612）证实光效（lm/W）及其他声明性能数值，并就该批货物贴附任何要求的能效标签或能效声明。须向 RSB／进口商确认特定灯／灯具类别当前是否适用强制能效标签，因为覆盖范围可能因类别而异且在演变中。
summary.zht: 盧旺達並未實行帶 EPREL 數據庫的歐盟生態設計法規（EU）2019/2020 最低性能制度。照明能效通過盧旺達國家能效計劃及任何適用的盧旺達標準／能效標籤要求處理，由 RSB 及國家能源主管部門支持。實際義務是在 RSB PVoC 計劃內以可靠檢測數據（通常基於 IEC 62612）證實光效（lm/W）及其他聲明性能數值，並就該批貨物貼附任何要求的能效標籤或能效聲明。須向 RSB／進口商確認特定燈／燈具類別當前是否適用強制能效標籤，因為覆蓋範圍可能因類別而異且在演變中。

standards_or_laws: Rwanda national energy-efficiency programme — lighting energy labelling / efficiency declaration (scope to be confirmed with RSB)
RS / IEC 62612 — performance / efficacy basis for the efficiency claim
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling and minimum-efficiency regime for LED lamps under GB 30255 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps), administered through the China Energy Label (CEL) self-declaration and filing system. Products below the minimum efficiency grade may not be placed on the Chinese market, and the China Energy Label must be affixed. This GB 30255 grade and the China Energy Label are domestic; they are not the Rwandan label and do not by themselves satisfy any Rwandan energy-labelling requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对 LED 灯实行强制能效标签与最低能效制度，依据 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 产品能效限定值及能效等级），通过中国能效标识（CEL）自我声明与备案系统管理。低于最低能效等级的产品不得在中国市场销售，须加贴中国能效标识。GB 30255 等级与中国能效标识均属境内；其非卢旺达标签，本身不满足任何卢旺达能效标签要求。
summary.zht: 中國對 LED 燈實行強制能效標籤與最低能效制度，依據 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 產品能效限定值及能效等級），通過中國能效標識（CEL）自我聲明與備案系統管理。低於最低能效等級的產品不得在中國市場銷售，須加貼中國能效標識。GB 30255 等級與中國能效標識均屬境內；其非盧旺達標籤，本身不滿足任何盧旺達能效標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps (mandatory)
China Energy Label (CEL) — self-declaration and filing system administered by the national energy-efficiency label centre

gap.en: China has a single, well-defined mandatory energy regime (GB 30255 + China Energy Label). Rwanda does NOT replicate the EU Ecodesign minimum-performance / EPREL structure; its energy treatment runs through the national energy-efficiency programme and applicable RS, so there is no one-to-one EU-equivalent threshold to map against and no EPREL-style central database. The China Energy Label cannot be reused for Rwanda. The exporter should: (1) confirm with RSB / the importer whether a mandatory energy label applies to the specific category; (2) substantiate efficacy with an IEC 62612-based report; and (3) apply any required Rwandan energy label per the current programme rules. State plainly to the importer that the EU Ecodesign minimum-efficacy regime is not in force in Rwanda.
gap.zh: 中国有单一、明确的强制能效制度（GB 30255＋中国能效标识）。卢旺达并不复制欧盟生态设计最低性能／EPREL 结构；其能效处理通过国家能效计划及适用 RS 进行，故不存在可一一对照的欧盟等效阈值，也无 EPREL 式中央数据库。中国能效标识不可在卢旺达复用。出口商应：（1）向 RSB／进口商确认特定类别是否适用强制能效标签；（2）以基于 IEC 62612 的报告证实光效；（3）依现行计划规则贴附任何要求的卢旺达能效标签。应向进口商如实说明欧盟生态设计最低光效制度在卢旺达并不生效。
gap.zht: 中國有單一、明確的強制能效制度（GB 30255＋中國能效標識）。盧旺達並不複製歐盟生態設計最低性能／EPREL 結構；其能效處理通過國家能效計劃及適用 RS 進行，故不存在可一一對照的歐盟等效閾值，也無 EPREL 式中央數據庫。中國能效標識不可在盧旺達複用。出口商應：（1）向 RSB／進口商確認特定類別是否適用強制能效標籤；（2）以基於 IEC 62612 的報告證實光效；（3）依現行計劃規則貼附任何要求的盧旺達能效標籤。應向進口商如實說明歐盟生態設計最低光效制度在盧旺達並不生效。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / category-specific — addressed via Rwanda's national energy-efficiency programme rather than an EU-style Ecodesign minimum + EPREL; confirm current label applicability with RSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255 minimum efficiency grade and China Energy Label required before placing LED lamps on the Chinese market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda does not run the EU Ecodesign minimum-efficacy / EPREL regime; lighting energy efficiency is handled through the national energy-efficiency programme and applicable RS. China's mandatory GB 30255 grade and China Energy Label are domestic and cannot be reused for Rwanda. Substantiate efficacy with an IEC 62612-based report, confirm category label applicability with RSB, and apply any required Rwandan energy label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达不实行欧盟生态设计最低光效／EPREL 制度；照明能效通过国家能效计划及适用 RS 处理。中国强制 GB 30255 等级与中国能效标识属境内，不可在卢旺达复用。须以基于 IEC 62612 的报告证实光效，向 RSB 确认类别标签适用性，并贴附任何要求的卢旺达能效标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達不實行歐盟生態設計最低光效／EPREL 制度；照明能效通過國家能效計劃及適用 RS 處理。中國強制 GB 30255 等級與中國能效標識屬境內，不可在盧旺達複用。須以基於 IEC 62612 的報告證實光效，向 RSB 確認類別標籤適用性，並貼附任何要求的盧旺達能效標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Marking, Labelling & In-Country Importer (RSB S-Mark / import inspection)
requirement_topic.zh: 标识、标签与在地进口商（RSB S-Mark／进口检验）
requirement_topic.zht: 標識、標籤與在地進口商（RSB S-Mark／進口檢驗）

summary.en: Regulated LED products entering Rwanda must carry compliant product marking and may need to bear the RSB S-Mark / pass RSB import inspection, with a Certificate of Conformity issued under the PVoC programme per consignment. Marking should include rated voltage / frequency (matching the 230 V / 50 Hz grid), rated power, manufacturer / brand identification, and any required safety and category markings. A registered in-country importer of record is the responsible party for customs clearance and inspection. Because Rwanda is landlocked, goods route via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam, so the conformity documentation must travel with the consignment to clear transit and the Rwandan border.
summary.zh: 进入卢旺达的受管制 LED 产品须带有合规产品标识，并可能须加贴 RSB S-Mark／通过 RSB 进口检验，逐批由 PVoC 计划签发符合性证书。标识应包括额定电压／频率（匹配 230 V／50 Hz 电网）、额定功率、制造商／品牌标识，以及任何要求的安全与类别标识。注册的在地进口记录人为清关与检验的责任方。由于卢旺达为内陆国，货物经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆转运，故符合性文件须随货同行，以通过转运及卢旺达边境。
summary.zht: 進入盧旺達的受管制 LED 產品須帶有合規產品標識，並可能須加貼 RSB S-Mark／通過 RSB 進口檢驗，逐批由 PVoC 計劃簽發符合性證書。標識應包括額定電壓／頻率（匹配 230 V／50 Hz 電網）、額定功率、製造商／品牌標識，以及任何要求的安全與類別標識。註冊的在地進口記錄人為清關與檢驗的責任方。由於盧旺達為內陸國，貨物經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆轉運，故符合性文件須隨貨同行，以通過轉運及盧旺達邊境。

standards_or_laws: RSB S-Mark / import inspection scheme for regulated products
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment
RS / IEC 60598-1 & RS / IEC 62560 — product marking requirements (voltage, power, identification)

summary.en: For the Chinese market, marking and labelling of in-scope luminaires and lamps follow the GB 7000 / GB 24906 marking clauses and the CCC mark requirement (CCC logo, factory code) where the product is within CNCA-C10-01 scope, plus the China Energy Label where GB 30255 applies. The responsible party in China is the domestic manufacturer / certificate holder. These marks (CCC, China Energy Label) and the 220 V rating reflect the Chinese domestic regime and are not the Rwandan S-Mark or import-inspection requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国市场，范围内灯具与灯的标识依据 GB 7000／GB 24906 标识条款及 CCC 标志要求（CCC 标志、工厂代码）（产品在 CNCA-C10-01 范围内时），并在 GB 30255 适用时加贴中国能效标识。中国境内责任方为本地制造商／证书持有人。这些标志（CCC、中国能效标识）及 220 V 额定值反映中国境内制度，并非卢旺达 S-Mark 或进口检验要求。
summary.zht: 在中國市場，範圍內燈具與燈的標識依據 GB 7000／GB 24906 標識條款及 CCC 標誌要求（CCC 標誌、工廠代碼）（產品在 CNCA-C10-01 範圍內時），並在 GB 30255 適用時加貼中國能效標識。中國境內責任方為本地製造商／證書持有人。這些標誌（CCC、中國能效標識）及 220 V 額定值反映中國境內制度，並非盧旺達 S-Mark 或進口檢驗要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000 / GB 24906 — marking and labelling clauses for luminaires and self-ballasted LED lamps
CCC mark requirement (CNCA-C10-01) and China Energy Label (GB 30255) where applicable

gap.en: Both regimes require product marking, but the marks and responsible-party structure differ. China uses the CCC mark + China Energy Label with a domestic certificate holder; Rwanda uses the RSB S-Mark / import inspection + PVoC Certificate of Conformity with an in-country importer of record. The CCC mark and China Energy Label are not recognised in Rwanda. Rated-voltage marking must be reviewed for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid. There is no EU-style Authorised Representative — the in-country importer carries the border responsibility. Conformity documents must accompany the consignment through the Mombasa / Dar es Salaam transit route.
gap.zh: 两种制度均要求产品标识，但标志与责任方结构不同。中国采用 CCC 标志＋中国能效标识及境内证书持有人；卢旺达采用 RSB S-Mark／进口检验＋PVoC 符合性证书及在地进口记录人。CCC 标志与中国能效标识在卢旺达不被承认。额定电压标识须按 230 V／50 Hz 电网复核。不存在欧盟式授权代表——由在地进口商承担边境责任。符合性文件须随货物经蒙巴萨／达累斯萨拉姆转运路线同行。
gap.zht: 兩種制度均要求產品標識，但標誌與責任方結構不同。中國採用 CCC 標誌＋中國能效標識及境內證書持有人；盧旺達採用 RSB S-Mark／進口檢驗＋PVoC 符合性證書及在地進口記錄人。CCC 標誌與中國能效標識在盧旺達不被承認。額定電壓標識須按 230 V／50 Hz 電網複核。不存在歐盟式授權代表——由在地進口商承擔邊境責任。符合性文件須隨貨物經蒙巴薩／達累斯薩拉姆轉運路線同行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RSB S-Mark / import inspection and PVoC Certificate of Conformity required for regulated LED products; compliant marking and an in-country importer of record needed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in scope — CCC mark (CNCA-C10-01) and China Energy Label (GB 30255) with a domestic certificate holder

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Regulated LED products for Rwanda need compliant marking, the RSB S-Mark / import inspection, and a PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment, with a registered in-country importer of record. China's CCC mark and China Energy Label are not recognised in Rwanda. Verify rated-voltage marking for 230 V / 50 Hz and ensure conformity documents accompany the consignment via the Mombasa / Dar es Salaam route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卢旺达的受管制 LED 产品须具备合规标识、RSB S-Mark／进口检验，以及逐批 PVoC 符合性证书，并设注册在地进口记录人。中国 CCC 标志与中国能效标识在卢旺达不被承认。须核验 230 V／50 Hz 额定电压标识，并确保符合性文件随货经蒙巴萨／达累斯萨拉姆路线同行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向盧旺達的受管制 LED 產品須具備合規標識、RSB S-Mark／進口檢驗，以及逐批 PVoC 符合性證書，並設註冊在地進口記錄人。中國 CCC 標誌與中國能效標識在盧旺達不被承認。須核驗 230 V／50 Hz 額定電壓標識，並確保符合性文件隨貨經蒙巴薩／達累斯薩拉姆路線同行。
